description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 43 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 23 mins. His tracked work was spread across 6 projects, and his activity included Java, Markdown, TypeScript, and other languages. He did not open any GitHub PRs, create any new repos, or record any commits this week.
